description_long: This house features a sprawling, multi-sectioned layout with a combination of red-tiled hip and gable roofs, white exterior walls, and multiple large windows. The front facade is symmetrical, with two prominent bay windows flanking a central entryway, and a circular driveway leading up to the entrance. The property includes landscaped greenery, palm trees, and a rear garden area bordered by a low wall. The rear of the house opens to a patio and pool area, with a modern glass railing and additional outdoor space. The side elevations reveal a mix of flat and sloped roof sections, as well as a garage and secondary entrances. The overall design blends Mediterranean and contemporary elements, with a focus on open, airy spaces and outdoor living.
description: A large, white house with red-tiled roofs, symmetrical front bay windows, and landscaped gardens, featuring a rear patio and pool area. The design combines Mediterranean and modern styles with multiple stories and expansive outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, circular driveway, symmetrical bay windows, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, secondary entrances, and the elongated structure of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio, pool area, glass railing, and a row of palm trees along the back boundary.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional roof details, side windows, and the extended driveway leading to the rear garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with bay windows and large glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with steps, covered porch, decorative columns, and flanking bay windows
